caption: A man with a tall, grey, textured wig, glasses, and over-ear headphones is seated in a studio setting. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. He is positioned behind a black microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and shelving displaying apparel, including items with the "LEE" logo. Overlaid on the scene are graphics: a logo on the left that reads "STUDIO PODCAST" and a logo on the right that reads "GOSS TALK JOY." Throughout the sequence, the man remains relatively still, though his facial expression shifts slightly from a neutral gaze to a subtle frown, and he tilts his head minimally. The camera angle and the surrounding environment remain constant across the frames.
